meaning: 瓜达尔[巴基斯坦西南部港市]
examples: Gwadar is where dreams clash with reality.
China is also helping Pakistan build the Gwadar deep-sea port.
Under an ambitious scheme, it could be developed to take goods by road and rail between Gwadar and south-west China.
It has a new deepwater port, Gwadar, and provides a route for trade and pipelines to Central Asia.
However, Hamayoun Khan, of the National Defence University in Islamabad, insists that China's interest in Gwadar remains chiefly commercial.
